summary: 3 film announcements, 4 TV announcements across 5 trades.

film.title: The Worst
film.talent: Keira Knightley, Alicia Vikander, Anthony Boyle, Sam Claflin, Tom Hollander, Josh Finan
film.announcement: Anthony Boyle, Sam Claflin, Tom Hollander and Josh Finan join the ensemble cast of the dark comedy alongside Keira Knightley and Alicia Vikander.

film.title: Error#404
film.announcement: Anshuman Jha's First Ray Films boards animated feature, selected for MIFA at Annecy.

film.title: The Tutor
film.talent: Mia McKenna-Bruce, Alex Hassell (voice actors); Rosie Day (creator/writer)
film.announcement: Mia McKenna-Bruce and Alex Hassell voice cast in Rosie Day's Audible Original thriller.

tv.title: Dept. Q
tv.announcement: Season 2 adds new cast including Aisling Franciosi and Greg Wise; production starts in Scotland.

tv.title: Blue Murder Motel
tv.announcement: Acorn TV and ITV acquire kiwi cozy crime drama.

tv.title: Hamburg Days
tv.talent: Asa Butterfield, Jonny Lee Miller, Christine Tremarco
tv.announcement: Asa Butterfield, Jonny Lee Miller and Christine Tremarco join BBC Beatles drama.

tv.title: Alley Cats
tv.announcement: Netflix animation from Ricky Gervais receives enthusiastic response at Annecy.
